description:
Implement `hx-focus-ring` (T4 Infrastructure) — utility that renders a consistent visible focus indicator around an element, using CSS custom properties from the design token system.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-focus-ring/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-focus-ring.ts`, `hx-focus-ring.styles.ts`, `hx-focus-ring.stories.ts`, `hx-focus-ring.test.ts`

**Props:** `visible` (boolean — show/hide ring), `color` (string — CSS color override, falls back to `--hx-focus-ring-color`), `width` (string — ring width, falls back to `--hx-focus-ring-width`), `offset` (string — ring offset, falls back to `--hx-focus-ring-offset`), `shape` (`box`|`circle`|`pill`)

**Slots:** default (the focusable element being wrapped)

**CSS Parts:** `base`, `ring`

**Implementation:** Renders an absolutely-positioned `<div part="ring">` that overlays the slotted content. The ring is only visible when `visible=true`. Other components use this internally for consistent focus indication.

**ARIA:** No ARIA semantics — purely visual. The slotted focusable element manages its own ARIA.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, tests (visible toggle, token consumption), axe-core zero violations, Storybook showing button wrapped in focus ring, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-focus-ring — T4 Focus Indicator Utility
